summary: Classified this PR-inventory shard independently. The hydrated preflight artifact contains live state for 20 of 25 listed PRs; those are kept non-mutating because this is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix/low-signal closeout are disabled. Five listed PRs were not hydrated in the artifact, so those specific decisions need refreshed live state before classification.
